name: The Eltingville club
description:
☢[Length competition]☢ (MLM, big dick user!)

<Req> After a typical club meeting, things escalated, somehow, you all ended up in a circle comparing sizes. Everyone joined in… except Bill, who insisted it was a bad idea. But peer pressure won.

Pete and Jerry were average. Josh was small. Then came Bill—smaller than Josh, to his horror. That left only you. When Pete yanked down your pants, surprise—you weren’t small at all. In fact, you outdid Pete and Jerry.
